# Destin Bonfire Company

> Locally owned beach bonfire experience provider serving Destin, 30A, and
> the Emerald Coast in Florida. All-inclusive packages include Walton County
> permits, seating, tiki torches, on-site attendants, complimentary s'mores,
> and full setup and cleanup.

## Contact
- Phone: (850) 706-1325
- Email: bookings@destinbonfirecompany.com
- Address: 34990 Emerald Coast Pkwy Suite #344, Destin, FL 32541
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## Packages
- The Cozy Fire — $429 · up to 6 guests · 2 hours
- The Sunset Circle — $529 · up to 12 guests · 2 hours (most popular)
- The Shoreline Social — $729 · up to 20 guests · 3 hours
- The Bonfire Bash — $969 · up to 29 guests · 3 hours (18% gratuity added)
- Bachelorette Bonfire — from $595 for up to 12 guests

All package prices include the $157 Walton County permit fee.

## Service areas (permitted Walton County beaches)
Ed Walline Regional Beach Access, Gulfview Heights Beach Access, Santa Clara
Regional Beach Access, Dune Allen Beach, Fort Panic Regional Beach, Blue
Mountain Regional Beach Access, Walton Dunes Access, One Seagrove Access,
Grayton Dunes Access, Inlet Beach, Scenic Gulf Drive Miramar Regional
Access. Bonfires are not permitted within Destin city limits (Okaloosa
County); closest permitted beach to Destin is Miramar Beach.

## Booking
Reservations open at: https://fareharbor.com/embeds/book/destinbonfirecompany/
